title: CompetencyMaturity
description: A Maturity node — the organizational maturity of a competency. This is a DERIVED, materialized view: it is computed from evidence and assessments (never entered by hand) and regenerated when its inputs change. Consumers should treat it as read-only projection output.

id.description: Maturity identifier. Grammar: 'maturity:' prefix + dot-separated slug levels, each matching [a-z0-9-] (typically mirrors the competency slug, e.g. 'maturity:rag-knowledge-retrieval').

competency.description: Competency node id this maturity is computed for

derived.description: Always true — flags this node as a computed projection, not hand-authored source data

computedOn.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) the level was last computed

basis.description: Node ids (evidence:* / assessment:*) the level was derived from

verification.description: Verification block for this derived node
